---
title: "Experiment 4b"
author: "Anna Dorling"
date: '2026-06-08'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Contents
- 1) Loading and processing data
- 2) Cumulative feeding dynamics
- 3) Rate analysis
- 4) FBD analysis
- 5) Preference analysis
- 6) Individual preference trajectories

******************************************

# 1) Loading and processing data

Load libraries
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(plyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(DHARMa)
```

Import OD data
```{r}
data <- read.csv("proboscis_data_Jan-25.csv")
```


Extract time information from the time_in_experiment variable (python output format includes 'days', which is not eaily manoeuvrable in R)
```{r}
# Create a new vector to store modified strings
characters.wanted.default <- 8:17 # Default for "0 days" (e want just the time bit, not the "0 days " bit)
characters.wanted.minus1 <- 10:19 # For "-1 days +"
strings_to_change <- data$Time_in_experiment

# Dynamically determine the indices for each string
new_strings <- sapply(strings_to_change, function(x) {
  if (startsWith(x, "-1 days +")) {
    # Use indices for "-1 days +" case
    characters.wanted <- characters.wanted.minus1} 
  else {characters.wanted <- characters.wanted.default} # Use default indices
  # Extract the time portion of the string
  paste(strsplit(x, '')[[1]][characters.wanted], collapse = '')})

# Remove NA or invalid characters
new_strings2 <- str_replace_all(new_strings, "([NANA])", "")

# Save timestamps as a new variable in the data frame
data$Plot_time <- new_strings2

head(data)
```

Create other time variables that are more tractable for analysis
```{r}
#Change plot_time to a format that can be compared
data <- dplyr::mutate(data,
                    Num_time = lubridate::hms(Plot_time), #Transform the character time vector into a period object that can be used for calculations
                    Time_min = as.numeric(Num_time)/60) #Create a 'minutes into experiment' variable
data$Time_hour = data$Time_min/60 #Do the same as above but for hours, for 24h recording (pilot was shorter so only needed mins)
#head(data)

data <- data %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Round, RPi, Time_min) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Video = factor(Video, levels = unique(Video))) %>%  # Reset factor levels based on new order
  dplyr::mutate(Video_index = as.numeric(Video)) %>%  # Convert to numeric
  dplyr::arrange(Round, RPi, Video_index, Frame)
```

Reorder the variables
```{r}
data <- data %>% dplyr::select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, Time_min, Behaviour, everything())
```

Check for NAs (can be generated through concatenation errors when producing proboscis data file in colab)
```{r}
head(data)
nrow(data)
colSums(is.na(data))
```

```{r}
#If there are no nas:
data_no_na <- data
```

Reorganise RPi variable (from character string to numeric)
```{r}
#Change character RPi variable to a factor
data_no_na$RPi <- as.factor(data_no_na$RPi)
levels(data_no_na$RPi)
```

Extract numbers from RPi string variable
```{r}
#Extract the number from the factor names
#Rename the RPi factor values. If it ends in '_', use the 4th character, else use the 4th and 5th
current_levels <- levels(data_no_na$RPi)
# Define a function to rename levels based on the condition
rename_levels <- function(level) {
  if (grepl("_$", level)) {
    # If the level ends with '_', get the 4th character
    return(substr(level, 4, 4))
  } else {
    # Otherwise, get the 4th and 5th characters
    return(substr(level, 4, 5))}}
# Apply the renaming function to each level
new_levels <- sapply(current_levels, rename_levels)
#print(new_levels)
# Assign the new levels to the factor
levels(data_no_na$RPi) <- new_levels
levels(data_no_na$RPi)
```

## Find and label bouts of activity

Order the data and convert video variable to factor
```{r}
# Order the dataframe by RPi, Num_time, and Value
ordered_data <- data_no_na #Already ordered further up
ordered_data$Video <- as.factor(ordered_data$Video)
```

Segment all of this info into bouts

Start by comparing timestamps between frames. If greater than x seconds, label as belonging to a new activity bout
```{r}
TIME_GAP <- 2.9 #Max number of seconds between food contact frames before new bout started
# Calculate time difference in seconds and create bout numbers (w 0.2s resolution)
labelled_data <- ordered_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Time difference in seconds since the previous frame (keeping decimal precision)
    mins_since_prev_frame = (Time_min - lag(Time_min, default = first(Time_min))),
    # Create a new bout when the time gap exceeds 1 second
    Activity_bout_number = cumsum(ifelse(is.na(mins_since_prev_frame) | mins_since_prev_frame > (TIME_GAP/60), 1, 0))) %>% #first one here
  ungroup()

#Move bout number over to the left with the rest of the variables that are important for navigating the data
labelled_data <- labelled_data %>% dplyr::select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, Activity_bout_number, Time_min, Behaviour, everything())
```

Group bouts with the same number and label their start and end frames (if only single frame bout, only start_frame will be annotated)
```{r}
# Step 2: Label Start and End Bouts
labelled_data <- labelled_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video, Activity_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Activity_bout_status = case_when(
      row_number() == 1 ~ "Start_bout",  # First frame in the bout
      row_number() == n() ~ "End_bout",  # Last frame in the bout
      TRUE ~ "0")) %>%                   # Intermediate frames
  ungroup()
```

Compare numbers of start and end activity bouts ('activity bouts' being any activity, inc Prob_out)
```{r}
# Step 3: Validate the output
Activity_bout_summary <- labelled_data %>%
 # group_by(Video_index) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_start_bouts = sum(Activity_bout_status == "Start_bout"),
    total_end_bouts = sum(Activity_bout_status == "End_bout"),
    unmatched_start = total_start_bouts - total_end_bouts)

print(Activity_bout_summary)
```

Remove individual frames
```{r}
# Remove single-frame bouts
labelled_data <- labelled_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index, Activity_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Bout_size = n()) %>%  # Count the number of frames in each bout
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::filter(Bout_size > 1) %>%  # Retain only bouts with more than x frames (i.e. 1s or more)
  dplyr::select(-Bout_size)  # Optional: Remove the helper column for clarity
```

```{r}
# Step 3: Validate the output
Activity_bout_summary <- labelled_data %>%
#  dplyr::group_by(Video_index) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_start_bouts = sum(Activity_bout_status == "Start_bout"),
    total_end_bouts = sum(Activity_bout_status == "End_bout"),
    unmatched_start = total_start_bouts - total_end_bouts)
print(Activity_bout_summary)
```

Create new variable to number the activity bouts (of 2+ frames) uniquely (within videos)
```{r}
#Create a new variable to identify data that gives a unique number to each unique combination of RPi and Round
# Create a unique bout identifier across all videos
ordered_activity_data_filtered_endbouts <- labelled_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index, Activity_bout_number) %>% #Group by activity bout within video
  dplyr::mutate(Activity_bout_ID = cur_group_id()) %>% #
  dplyr::ungroup()

ordered_activity_data_filtered_endbouts <- ordered_activity_data_filtered_endbouts %>% dplyr::select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, Activity_bout_status, Time_min, Behaviour, Activity_bout_number, Activity_bout_ID, everything())
```


## Find and label drinking bouts (tube_prob present and tip of the proboscis present)

```{r}
DRINKING_BOUT_THRESHOLD <- 0.9 #If more than x seconds of no drinking behaviour, start a new feeding bout
```

Select only frames where proboscis in feeder and tip visible
```{r}
#Isolate drinking data
drinking_data <- ordered_activity_data_filtered_endbouts %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Behaviour == "Drinking" & Tube_prob_likelihood > DRINKING_BOUT_THRESHOLD & End_prob_likelihood > DRINKING_BOUT_THRESHOLD)
```

Assign bout numbers
```{r}
# Step 1: Assign bout numbers
ordered_drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  #arrange(Video_index, Frame) %>% #ALREADY ARRANGED
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Time difference in seconds since the previous frame
    secs_since_prev_frame = (Time_min - lag(Time_min, default = first(Time_min))) * 60,
    # Create a new bout when the time gap exceeds 1 seconds
    Drinking_bout_number = cumsum(ifelse(is.na(secs_since_prev_frame) | secs_since_prev_frame > DRINKING_BOUT_THRESHOLD, 1, 0))) %>% #Modify first of the three numbers to change the threshold (s)
  ungroup()

#Reorder variables
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>% select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, secs_since_prev_frame, Drinking_bout_number, Behaviour, Plot_time, everything())

# Step 2: Label Start and End Bouts
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index, Drinking_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Drinking_bout_state = case_when(
      row_number() == 1 ~ "Start_drinking_bout",  # First frame in the bout
      row_number() == n() ~ "End_drinking_bout",  # Last frame in the bout
      TRUE ~ "0")) %>%                        # Intermediate frames
  ungroup()

ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>% select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, secs_since_prev_frame, Drinking_bout_state, Drinking_bout_number, Behaviour, Plot_time, everything())
```

```{r}
# Check counts of 'Start_bout' and 'End_bout'
table(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state)
```

```{r}
# Remove single-frame bouts
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Video_index, Frame) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index, Drinking_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Drinking_bout_size = n()) %>%  # Count the number of frames in each bout
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::filter(Drinking_bout_size > 1) #%>%  # Retain only bouts with more than two frames
  #select(-Bout_size)  # Optional: Remove the helper column for clarity

# Check counts of 'Start_bout' and 'End_bout' to verify they are now balanced
table(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state)
```

```{r}
# Create a unique drinking bout identifier across all videos
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>%
 # arrange(Video_index, Frame) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Video_index, Drinking_bout_number) %>% #Group drinking bouts within each video
  dplyr::mutate(Global_drinking_bout_number = cur_group_id()) %>% #Number them
  ungroup()

ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_number <- ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_number + 1 #Make it start from 1 instead of 0

#Reorder variables
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data %>% select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame, Plot_time, secs_since_prev_frame, Drinking_bout_state, Drinking_bout_number, Global_drinking_bout_number, Behaviour, everything())
```

## Remove outliers

```{r}
## OUTLIERS: RPi6 round 5, RPi2 round 1, RPi5 round 2, RPi 9 round 5, RPi 5 round 3
drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(RPi == 6 & Round == 5))
drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(RPi == 2 & Round == 1))
drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(RPi == 5 & Round == 2))
drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(RPi == 9 & Round == 5))
drinking_data <- drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(RPi == 5 & Round == 3))
```

## Add velocities

```{r}
#Create columns
ordered_drinking_data_velocities <- ordered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Frame) %>% #Order by frame
  dplyr::arrange(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>% # Group by bout
 #Create new columns (vx and vy)
  dplyr::mutate(vx = "") %>% # Create an incremental bout number per bee
  dplyr::mutate(vy = "") %>%
  ungroup()

ordered_drinking_data_velocities <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Frame) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%  # Ensure correct ordering
  dplyr::group_by(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%  # Group by bout
  dplyr::mutate(vy = ifelse(Drinking_bout_state == "Start_drinking_bout", NA,
                      ifelse(Frame - lag(Frame) > 1,
                             (End_prob_y - lag(End_prob_y))/(Frame - lag(Frame)),
                             End_prob_y - lag(End_prob_y)))) %>% 
  ungroup()

ordered_drinking_data_velocities$vertical_motion <- sqrt((ordered_drinking_data_velocities$vy)^2)
```

```{r}
ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities
```

```{r}
average_velocities <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%  # Group by drinking episode
  dplyr::summarize(av_vertical_motion = mean(vertical_motion, na.rm = TRUE),
                   Round = first(Round),
                   RPi = first(RPi),
                   Tube = first(Tube),
                   Start_time_min = first(Time_min),
                   End_time_min = last(Time_min),
                   duration_secs = (End_time_min - Start_time_min)*60)  # Compute average per bout

# Reassign the Tube variable
average_velocities$Tube <- factor(ifelse(average_velocities$Tube == "left", "L",
                         ifelse(average_velocities$Tube == "right", "R", NA)))
```

## 4. Label sips (bursts) within drinking bouts

```{r}
ordered_drinking_data_velocities_sips <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sip = {
      streak_sum <- 0
      in_sip <- FALSE
      sip_flag <- rep(0, n())
      
      for (i in seq_along(vy)) {
        if (is.na(vy[i])) {
          streak_sum <- 0
          in_sip <- FALSE
          sip_flag[i] <- 0
        } else if (vy[i] < 0) {
          streak_sum <- streak_sum + vy[i]
          if (!in_sip && streak_sum <= -35) {
            sip_flag[i] <- 1
            in_sip <- TRUE
          }
        } else {
          streak_sum <- 0
          in_sip <- FALSE
        }
      }
      sip_flag
    }
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sip_clean = replace_na(sip, 0),
    Cumulative_sips_in_drinking_bout = cumsum(sip_clean)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}
ordered_drinking_data_velocities_sips <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities_sips %>% 
  dplyr::select(Round, RPi, Tube, Video_index, Frame,
         secs_since_prev_frame, Drinking_bout_state, Global_drinking_bout_number, sip, sip_clean,
         everything())

ordered_drinking_data <- ordered_drinking_data_velocities_sips
```


# 5. Load blinds and use to label data

```{r}
blinds <- read.csv("blinds_otherdrugs_all.csv")

blinds <- blinds[ , !grepl("X", names(blinds))]
head(blinds)

blinds[which(blinds$Solution == "X"),]$Solution <- ifelse(blinds[which(blinds$Solution == "X"),]$Treatment == "AREC", "Arecoline", "Scopolamine")
```

```{r}
#Find the evap entries
evap_entries <- blinds[which(blinds$RPi == "Evap"),]
evap_entries
```

```{r}
blinds_mapping <- data.frame(blinds$Round, blinds$RPi, blinds$Treatment, blinds$Pre.exp_treat, blinds$Tube, blinds$Solution, blinds$Notes)
blinds_mapping <- blinds_mapping[which(blinds_mapping$blinds.RPi != "Evap"),]
# Reorder the dataframe
blinds_mapping$blinds.RPi <- as.numeric(blinds_mapping$blinds.RPi)
ordered_blinds_mapping <- blinds_mapping %>%
  arrange(blinds.Round, blinds.RPi)
```

```{r}
#Rename columns in the blinds dataframe
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.RPi"] <- "RPi"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Tube"] <- "Tube"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Solution"] <- "Solution"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Round"] <- "Round"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Pre.exp_treat"] <- "Pre_exposure"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Treatment"] <- "Treatment"
names(ordered_blinds_mapping)[names(ordered_blinds_mapping) == "blinds.Notes"] <- "Mitigation_info"
```

```{r}
ordered_blinds_mapping$Solution <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$Solution)
ordered_blinds_mapping$Pre_exposure <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$Pre_exposure)
ordered_blinds_mapping$Tube <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$Tube)
ordered_blinds_mapping$Treatment <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$Treatment)
```

```{r}
# Filter to include only the rows where Activity_bout is "End_bout"
ordered_drinking_data_subset <- ordered_drinking_data[ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "End_drinking_bout", ]
```

## Merge with the drinking data

```{r}
# Select only the necessary columns
ordered_drinking_data_subset <- ordered_drinking_data_subset[, c("Global_drinking_bout_number", "RPi", "Round", "Tube", "Plot_time", "Num_time", "Time_min", "Video", "Drinking_bout_number", "Cumulative_sips_in_drinking_bout")]
#print(knitr::kable(ordered_drinking_data_subset[1:10,]))

#ordered_burst_data_subset <- ordered_burst_data_subset[, c("Global_bout_number", "Global_burst_number", "Sip_number", "RPi", "Round", "Tube", "Plot_time", "Num_time", "Time_min", "Video")]
```

```{r}
ordered_blinds_mapping$RPi <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$RPi)
ordered_blinds_mapping$Round <- as.factor(ordered_blinds_mapping$Round)
```

```{r}
ordered_drinking_data_subset$Round <- as.factor(ordered_drinking_data_subset$Round)
#Add the solution information
ordered_drinking_data_subset$Tube <- factor(ifelse(ordered_drinking_data_subset$Tube == "left", "L",
                         ifelse(ordered_drinking_data_subset$Tube == "right", "R", NA)))

ordered_drinking_data_solution <- merge(
  ordered_drinking_data_subset,
  ordered_blinds_mapping,
  by = c("Round", "RPi", "Tube"),
  all.x = TRUE)
```


## 6. Summarise bout duration (and average amount of vertical motion of the proboscis tip)

```{r}
# Calculate the duration of each bout
All_drinking_bout_durations_ <- ordered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Global_drinking_bout_number) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(duration = max(Time_min) - min(Time_min),
                   total_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_in_drinking_bout),
                   av_vertical_motion = mean(vertical_motion, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_inter_sip_interval = {
  sip_times <- Time_min[sip == 1]*60
  if(length(sip_times) > 1) {
    mean(diff(sip_times), na.rm = TRUE)  # convert min to seconds
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }
},
sip_frequency = ifelse(total_sips > 0, total_sips / (duration * 60), NA)) %>%  # Course measure of av amount of mvt
  ungroup()
```


MERGE BLINDS with the summary drinking data
```{r}
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "Start_drinking_bout"),]$Tube #Get the relevant tube information to add to the cumulative dataframe
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Plot_time <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "End_drinking_bout"),]$Plot_time #Error arises when I remove the data from the weird RPi and Round combos
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Num_time <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "End_drinking_bout"),]$Num_time
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Time_min <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "End_drinking_bout"),]$Time_min
All_drinking_bout_durations_$RPi <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "Start_drinking_bout"),]$RPi
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Round <- ordered_drinking_data[which(ordered_drinking_data$Drinking_bout_state == "Start_drinking_bout"),]$Round
```

```{r}
# Merge the filtered df2 with df1 by Global_bout_number
All_drinking_bout_durations_ <- merge(All_drinking_bout_durations_, ordered_drinking_data_subset, by = "Global_drinking_bout_number")
# View the merged dataframe
#head(All_drinking_bout_durations)
```

```{r}
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
All_drinking_bout_durations_$RPi.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Round.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Plot_time.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Num_time.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Time_min.y <- NULL  # Remove unwanted duplicate
```

```{r}
# Add an index column to the activity bout durations data to preserve the original order
All_drinking_bout_durations_$index <- seq_len(nrow(All_drinking_bout_durations_))
All_drinking_bout_durations_ <- All_drinking_bout_durations_[order(All_drinking_bout_durations_$index), ] # Re-order merged df to match the original order
```

Rename
```{r}
#Rename columns in the blinds dataframe
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Tube.x"] <- "Tube"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Plot_time.x"] <- "Plot_time"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Num_time.x"] <- "Num_time"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Time_min.x"] <- "Time_min"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "RPi.x"] <- "RPi"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Round.x"] <- "Round"
#names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Video.x"] <- "Video"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Burst_number"] <- "Total_bursts"
names(All_drinking_bout_durations_)[names(All_drinking_bout_durations_) == "Sip_number"] <- "Total_sips"
```

```{r}
# Reassign the Tube variable
All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube <- factor(ifelse(All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube == "left", "L",
                         ifelse(All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube == "right", "R", NA)))
# Verify the changes
table(All_drinking_bout_durations_$Tube)
```

```{r}
#Need to remove round 6 RPi 6
# Ensure the data is sorted correctly
drinking_data <- All_drinking_bout_durations_ %>%
  dplyr::filter(!(duration > 1000/60)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Round, RPi)
```


```{r}
#Add the solution information
average_velocities <- merge(
  average_velocities,
  ordered_blinds_mapping,
  by = c("Round", "RPi", "Tube"),
  all.x = TRUE)
```

Carry over info about tube contents (and info about whether to retain)
```{r}
#Merge dataframes
merged_all_drinking_data <- merge(
  drinking_data,
  ordered_blinds_mapping,
  by = c("Round", "RPi", "Tube"),
  all.x = TRUE)
```

```{r}
drinking_data <- merged_all_drinking_data[which(merged_all_drinking_data$Mitigation_info != "Died"),]
drinking_data <- drinking_data[which(drinking_data$Mitigation_info != "Escaped"),]
drinking_data$seconds_fed <- drinking_data$duration * 60
```

OPPORTUNITY TO REMOVE OUTLIERS HERE
```{r}
filtered_drinking_data <- drinking_data
```

```{r}
filtered_drinking_data$Solution <- as.factor(filtered_drinking_data$Solution)
filtered_drinking_data$Time_hrs <- filtered_drinking_data$Time_min/60
```

**************************************
# 2. Cumulative feeding dynamics
**************************************

## 2a. Cumulative group feeding dynamics

Take the dataframe of all bouts and arrange them by time then make a cumulative variable that runs across each entire group. Create a bee ID variable, then do the same but within individual bees
```{r}
# Compute cumulative duration within each RPi/Round/Solution group
all_drinking_data_cumulative <- filtered_drinking_data %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Num_time) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Treatment, Solution) %>% ##Treatment, Solution
  dplyr::mutate(Cumulative_Duration_overall = cumsum(duration),
                Cumulative_sips_overall = cumsum(if_else(total_sips > 1, total_sips, 0))) %>% # Only include sips > 1
  ungroup()

all_drinking_data_cumulative <- all_drinking_data_cumulative %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bee_ID = factor(paste(RPi, Round, sep = "_")))

all_drinking_data_cumulative <- all_drinking_data_cumulative %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Time_hrs) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>% ##Treatment, Solution
  dplyr::mutate(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee = cumsum(duration),
                Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec = cumsum(duration*60),
                Cumulative_sips_overall_bee = cumsum(total_sips),
                Cumulative_attempts_bee = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
head(all_drinking_data_cumulative)
```

```{r}
new_row_cumulative_AREC1 <- tibble(
  Round = NA,   # Or assign appropriate values to Round, RPi, Tube, etc.
  RPi = NA,
  Tube = NA,
  Global_drinking_bout_number = NA,
  duration = NA,
  total_sips = NA,
  av_vertical_motion = NA,
  mean_inter_sip_interval = NA,
  sip_frequency = NA,
  seconds_fed = NA,
  Plot_time = NA,
  Num_time = NA,
  Time_min = 0,
  Video = NA,
  Drinking_bout_number = NA,
  Cumulative_sips_in_drinking_bout = NA,
  index = NA,
  Treatment = "AREC",
  Pre_exposure = NA,
  Solution = "Sucrose",
  Mitigation_info = NA,
  consumed_sucrose = NA,
  Time_hrs = 0,
  Cumulative_Duration_overall = 0,
  Cumulative_sips_overall = 0
)

new_row_cumulative_AREC2 <- tibble(
  Round = NA,   # Or assign appropriate values to Round, RPi, Tube, etc.
  RPi = NA,
  Tube = NA,
  Global_drinking_bout_number = NA,
  duration = NA,
  total_sips = NA,
  av_vertical_motion = NA,
  mean_inter_sip_interval = NA,
  sip_frequency = NA,
  seconds_fed = NA,
  Plot_time = NA,
  Num_time = NA,
  Time_min = 0,
  Video = NA,
  Drinking_bout_number = NA,
  Cumulative_sips_in_drinking_bout = NA,
  index = NA,
  Treatment = "AREC",
  Pre_exposure = NA,
  Solution = "Arecoline",
  Mitigation_info = NA,
  consumed_sucrose = NA,
  Time_hrs = 0,
  Cumulative_Duration_overall = 0,
  Cumulative_sips_overall = 0
)

  Round = NA,   # Or assign appropriate values to Round, RPi, Tube, etc.

```

Add them to the dataframe
```{r}
all_drinking_data_cumulative_0 <- bind_rows(
  new_row_cumulative_AREC1, new_row_cumulative_AREC2,
  new_row_cumulative_CAF1, new_row_cumulative_CAF2,
  new_row_cumulative_SCOP1, new_row_cumulative_SCOP2,
  new_row_cumulative_TMX1, new_row_cumulative_TMX2,
  new_row_cumulative_SUC1, new_row_cumulative_SUC2,
  all_drinking_data_cumulative)
```

ARECOLINE plot
```{r}
arecoline_cumulative_time_plot <- ggplot(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "AREC" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <= 24),], aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Cumulative_Duration_overall, color = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  theme_bw() +  theme(
   # legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")
  ) +
  ylab("Cumulative feeding duration (mins)") +
  xlab("Time in experiment (hours)") +
  ggtitle("Pilot") + scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  # ylim(c(0, 100)) +

arecoline_cumulative_time_plot
```

```{r}
caffeine_cumulative_plot <- ggplot(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "CAF" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),], aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Cumulative_Duration_overall, color = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  theme_bw() + theme(
    #legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  ) +scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4),
    labels = function(x) x  # Divide y-values by 60
) +
  ylab("Cumulative time spent feeding (mins)") +
  xlab("Time in experiment (h)") +
 # ggtitle("Drug-naive") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#F28C28"))# + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), expand = c(0, 0))     # Remove extra space above and below the axis
caffeine_cumulative_plot
```

SCOPOLAMINE

```{r}
scopolamine_cumulative_time_plot <- ggplot(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "SCOP" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),], aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Cumulative_Duration_overall, color = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  theme_bw() +  theme(
   # legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")
  ) +
  ylab("Cumulative feeding duration (mins)") +
  xlab("Time in experiment (hours)") +
  ggtitle("Pilot") + scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Scopolamine" = "purple")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))# + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
   #ylim(c(0, 100)) +

scopolamine_cumulative_time_plot
```

TMX plot

```{r}
TMX_cumulative_time_plot <- ggplot(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "TMX"),], aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Cumulative_Duration_overall, color = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  theme_bw() +  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")
  ) +
  ylab("Cumulative feeding duration (mins)") +
  xlab("Time in experiment (hours)") +
  ggtitle("Pilot") + scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "TMX" = "darkgreen"))# +
  #scale_x_continuous(
   # breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 1)) + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
  # ylim(c(0, 100)) +

TMX_cumulative_time_plot
```



## 2b. Cumulative individual duration

### Arecoline

Work out the average cumulative trajectory from all the individual timestamped cumulative bouts
Do this by time binning the bouts, then finding the max cumulative per bee measurement within each (cumulative duration, sips, and attempts)
```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "AREC" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions (NOTE: these are all AREC)
```{r}
binned_data_summary <- filled_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str)))

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("Arecoline", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

Create bootstrapping function for resampling from averages
```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Create a function to perform bootstrapping on cumulative time series
bootstrap_time_series <- function(data, num_samples) {
  # Create a matrix to store the bootstrapped samples
  boot_samples <- matrix(NA, nrow = num_samples, ncol = length(data))
  # Loop over the number of bootstrap samples
  for (i in 1:num_samples) {
    # Sample with replacement from the cumulative data
    boot_sample <- sample(data, size = length(data), replace = TRUE)
    # Store the resampled cumulative data
    boot_samples[i, ] <- cumsum(boot_sample)
  }
  # Return the matrix of bootstrapped cumulative time series
  return(boot_samples)}
```


```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_duration_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_duration, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_duration$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data
time_series_X_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$av_duration_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_duration, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_duration2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration2$Solution <- "Arecoline"
```

```{r}
# Add 0,0
S_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "Sucrose",
  Time_min = 0)
A_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "Arecoline",
  Time_min = 0)
C_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "Caffeine",
  Time_min = 0)
T_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "TMX",
  Time_min = 0)
Sc_origin_row <- data.frame(
  Time = 0,
  Cumulative = 0,
  Boot_Mean = NA,
  SE = 0,
  CI_Lower = NA,
  CI_Upper = NA,
  Actual_cumulative = 0,
  Solution = "Scopolamine",
  Time_min = 0)
```

```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(annotated_data_duration, annotated_data_duration2)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_duration, S_origin_row, A_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_arecoline <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_duration, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative time feeding per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))# + ylim(c(0,400))
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_arecoline
```

Find the mean T50 point (target_time_N <- mean(all_t50_times[which(all_t50_times$Solution == "N"),]$time_50pct)/60))

Go back to the cumulative dataframe (subset by focal treatment)
```{r}
cumulative_analysis_data_S <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "AREC" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Sucrose"),]
cumulative_analysis_data_X <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "AREC" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Arecoline"),]
```

```{r}
final_duration_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop") #Obtain end durations on sucrose for each bee
final_duration_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Arecoline",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_duration_S <- final_duration_S %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_duration_X <- final_duration_X %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_duration_S$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S$final_duration)
final_duration_X$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_X$final_duration)

final_duration_S$final_duration <- final_duration_S$final_duration*60
final_duration_X$final_duration <- final_duration_X$final_duration*60

final_duration_AREC_sucrose <- final_duration_S
final_duration_AREC_arecoline <- final_duration_X

#Put these final values back into the original cumulative dataframe so can then identify point at which 50% threshold crossed
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_duration_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60) #NB: this is a proportion, not a percentage...
```


Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_arecoline_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_arecoline_duration <- t50_times_S_arecoline_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_arecoline_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_arecoline_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_arecoline_duration, t50_times_S_arecoline_duration)

t50_wide_arecoline_duration <- all_t50_times_arecoline_duration %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$time_50pct_Arecoline)==1),]$time_50pct_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Arecoline <- 0
```

The above produces a wide dataframe with one row per bee, with time to 50% for each solution and cumulative metrics for each solution as different variables

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final feeding", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

Plotting arecoline duration
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Arecoline <- mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Arecoline <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Arecoline") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Arecoline) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Arecoline))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_arecoline <- cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_arecoline +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Arecoline, xend = target_time_Arecoline,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Arecoline$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "red",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Arecoline,
        y = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "red",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_arecoline
```

Arecoline attempts

```{r}
final_attempts_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Arecoline",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S <- final_attempts_S %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_attempts_X <- final_attempts_X %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_attempts_AREC_sucrose <- final_attempts_S
final_attempts_AREC_arecoline <- final_attempts_X

cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_arecoline_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_arecoline_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
```

Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_arecoline_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts <- t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_arecoline_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts, t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts)

t50_wide_arecoline_attempts <- all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$time_50pct_Arecoline)==1),]$time_50pct_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Arecoline <- 0
t50_wide_arecoline_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_arecoline_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Arecoline)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Arecoline <- 0
```

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final attempts", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_attempts_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_attempts, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_attempts$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_X_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$av_attempts_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_attempts, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_attempts2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts2$Solution <- "Arecoline"
```


```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(annotated_data_attempts, annotated_data_attempts2)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, S_origin_row, A_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_arecoline <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative feeding attempts per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) 
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_arecoline
```

Plotting arecoline attempts
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Arecoline <- mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts$Solution == "Arecoline"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Arecoline <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Arecoline") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Arecoline) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Arecoline))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts[which(all_t50_times_arecoline_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_arecoline <- cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_arecoline +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Arecoline, xend = target_time_Arecoline,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Arecoline$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "red",
    size = 1)  +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Arecoline,
        y = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "red",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)


cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_arecoline
```


### Caffeine

Work out the average cumulative trajectory from all the individual timestamped cumulative bouts
Do this by time binning the bouts, then finding the max cumulative per bee measurement within each (cumulative duration, sips, and attempts)
```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "CAF" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions (NOTE: these are all CAF)
```{r}
binned_data_summary <- filled_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str)))

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("Caffeine", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

Create bootstrapping function for resampling from averages
```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Create a function to perform bootstrapping on cumulative time series
bootstrap_time_series <- function(data, num_samples) {
  # Create a matrix to store the bootstrapped samples
  boot_samples <- matrix(NA, nrow = num_samples, ncol = length(data))
  # Loop over the number of bootstrap samples
  for (i in 1:num_samples) {
    # Sample with replacement from the cumulative data
    boot_sample <- sample(data, size = length(data), replace = TRUE)
    # Store the resampled cumulative data
    boot_samples[i, ] <- cumsum(boot_sample)
  }
  # Return the matrix of bootstrapped cumulative time series
  return(boot_samples)}
```


```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_duration_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_duration, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_duration$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data
time_series_X_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$av_duration_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_duration, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_duration2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration2$Solution <- "Caffeine"
```

```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(annotated_data_duration, annotated_data_duration2)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_duration, S_origin_row, C_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Caffeine <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_duration, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative time feeding per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))# + ylim(c(0,400))
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Caffeine
```

Find the mean T50 point (target_time_N <- mean(all_t50_times[which(all_t50_times$Solution == "N"),]$time_50pct)/60))

Go back to the cumulative dataframe (subset by focal treatment)
```{r}
cumulative_analysis_data_S <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "CAF" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Sucrose"),]
cumulative_analysis_data_X <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "CAF" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Caffeine"),]
```

```{r}
final_duration_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop") #Obtain end durations on sucrose for each bee
final_duration_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Caffeine",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_duration_S <- final_duration_S %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_duration_X <- final_duration_X %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_duration_S$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S$final_duration)
final_duration_X$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_X$final_duration)

final_duration_S$final_duration <- final_duration_S$final_duration*60
final_duration_X$final_duration <- final_duration_X$final_duration*60

final_duration_CAF_sucrose <- final_duration_S
final_duration_CAF_caffeine <- final_duration_X

#Put these final values back into the original cumulative dataframe so can then identify point at which 50% threshold crossed
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_duration_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60) #NB: this is a proportion, not a percentage...
```


Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration <- t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration, t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration)

t50_wide_Caffeine_duration <- all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$time_50pct_Caffeine)==1),]$time_50pct_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Caffeine <- 0
```

The above produces a wide dataframe with one row per bee, with time to 50% for each solution and cumulative metrics for each solution as different variables

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final feeding", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

Plotting Caffeine duration
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Caffeine <- mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Caffeine <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Caffeine") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Caffeine) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Caffeine))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_Caffeine <- cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Caffeine +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Caffeine, xend = target_time_Caffeine,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Caffeine$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#FFAC1C",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Caffeine,
        y = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#FFAC1C",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_Caffeine
```

Caffeine attempts

```{r}
final_attempts_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Caffeine",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S <- final_attempts_S %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_attempts_X <- final_attempts_X %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_attempts_CAF_sucrose <- final_attempts_S
final_attempts_CAF_caffeine <- final_attempts_X

cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_Caffeine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_Caffeine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
```

Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts <- t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts, t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts)

t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts <- all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$time_50pct_Caffeine)==1),]$time_50pct_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Caffeine <- 0
t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Caffeine_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Caffeine)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Caffeine <- 0
```

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final attempts", x = "Solution")
```
