```{r}
mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_attempts_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_attempts, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_attempts$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_X_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$av_attempts_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_attempts, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_attempts2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts2$Solution <- "Caffeine"
```


```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(annotated_data_attempts, annotated_data_attempts2)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, S_origin_row, C_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Caffeine <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative feeding attempts per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) 
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Caffeine
```

Plotting Caffeine attempts
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Caffeine <- mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts$Solution == "Caffeine"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Caffeine <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Caffeine") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Caffeine) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Caffeine))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Caffeine_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_Caffeine <- cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Caffeine +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Caffeine, xend = target_time_Caffeine,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Caffeine$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#FFAC1C",
    size = 1)  +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Caffeine,
        y = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#FFAC1C",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)


cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_Caffeine
```


### TMX

```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "TMX" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions (NOTE: these are all TMX)
```{r}
binned_data_summary <- filled_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str)))

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("TMX", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_duration_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_duration, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_duration$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data
time_series_X_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "TMX"),]$av_duration_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_duration, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_duration2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "TMX"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration2$Solution <- "TMX"
```

```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(annotated_data_duration, annotated_data_duration2)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_duration, S_origin_row, T_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_TMX <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_duration, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative time feeding per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "TMX" = "darkgreen")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "TMX" = "darkgreen")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))# + ylim(c(0,400))
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_TMX
```

Find the mean T50 point (target_time_N <- mean(all_t50_times[which(all_t50_times$Solution == "N"),]$time_50pct)/60))

Go back to the cumulative dataframe (subset by focal treatment)
```{r}
cumulative_analysis_data_S <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "TMX" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Sucrose"),]
cumulative_analysis_data_X <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "TMX" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "TMX"),]
```

```{r}
final_duration_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop") #Obtain end durations on sucrose for each bee
final_duration_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "TMX",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_duration_S <- final_duration_S %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_duration_X <- final_duration_X %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_duration_S$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S$final_duration)
final_duration_X$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_X$final_duration)

final_duration_S$final_duration <- final_duration_S$final_duration*60
final_duration_X$final_duration <- final_duration_X$final_duration*60

final_duration_TMX_sucrose <- final_duration_S
final_duration_TMX_tmx <- final_duration_X

#Put these final values back into the original cumulative dataframe so can then identify point at which 50% threshold crossed
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_duration_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60) #NB: this is a proportion, not a percentage...
```


Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_TMX_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_TMX_duration <- t50_times_S_TMX_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_TMX_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_TMX_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_TMX_duration, t50_times_S_TMX_duration)

t50_wide_TMX_duration <- all_t50_times_TMX_duration %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$time_50pct_TMX)==1),]$time_50pct_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_TMX <- 0
```

The above produces a wide dataframe with one row per bee, with time to 50% for each solution and cumulative metrics for each solution as different variables

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_TMX_duration, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final feeding", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_TMX_duration[which(all_t50_times_TMX_duration$Solution == "TMX"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_TMX_duration[which(all_t50_times_TMX_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

Plotting TMX duration
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_TMX <- mean(all_t50_times_TMX_duration[which(all_t50_times_TMX_duration$Solution == "TMX"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_TMX <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "TMX") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_TMX) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_TMX))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_TMX_duration[which(all_t50_times_TMX_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_TMX <- cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_TMX +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_TMX, xend = target_time_TMX,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_TMX$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "darkgreen",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_TMX,
        y = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "darkgreen",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_TMX
```

TMX attempts

```{r}
final_attempts_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "TMX",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S <- final_attempts_S %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_attempts_X <- final_attempts_X %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_attempts_TMX_sucrose <- final_attempts_S
final_attempts_TMX_tmx <- final_attempts_X

cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_TMX_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_TMX_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
```

Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_TMX_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_TMX_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_TMX_attempts <- t50_times_S_TMX_attempts %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_TMX_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_TMX_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_TMX_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_TMX_attempts, t50_times_S_TMX_attempts)

t50_wide_TMX_attempts <- all_t50_times_TMX_attempts %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$time_50pct_TMX)==1),]$time_50pct_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_TMX <- 0
t50_wide_TMX_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_TMX_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_TMX)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_TMX <- 0
```

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final attempts", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts[which(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts$Solution == "TMX"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts[which(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_attempts_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_attempts, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_attempts$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_X_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "TMX"),]$av_attempts_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_attempts, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_attempts2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "TMX"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts2$Solution <- "TMX"
```


```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(annotated_data_attempts, annotated_data_attempts2)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, S_origin_row, T_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_TMX <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative feeding attempts per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "TMX" = "darkgreen")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "TMX" = "darkgreen")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) 
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_TMX
```

Plotting TMX attempts
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_TMX <- mean(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts[which(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts$Solution == "TMX"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_TMX <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "TMX") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_TMX) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_TMX))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts[which(all_t50_times_TMX_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_TMX <- cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_TMX +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_TMX, xend = target_time_TMX,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_TMX$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "darkgreen",
    size = 1)  +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_TMX,
        y = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "darkgreen",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)


cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_TMX
```


### Scopolamine

```{r}
binned_data_duration <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "SCOP" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, sip_frequency, mean_inter_sip_interval, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 1, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    max_total_duration = max(Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_sips = max(Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    av_sipfreq = mean(sip_frequency, na.rm = TRUE),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    av_inter_sip_interval = mean(mean_inter_sip_interval, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")
```

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data <- binned_data_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions (NOTE: these are all SCOP)
```{r}
binned_data_summary <- filled_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str)))

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("Scopolamine", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary <- binned_data_summary %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is orde#4B0082 by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_duration_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_duration, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_duration$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data
time_series_X_duration <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$av_duration_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_duration, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_duration2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_duration),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_duration,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_duration2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$av_cumulative_duration
annotated_data_duration2$Solution <- "Scopolamine"
```

```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(annotated_data_duration, annotated_data_duration2)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_duration <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_duration, S_origin_row, Sc_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_duration$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Scopolamine <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_duration, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative time feeding per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Scopolamine" = "#4B0082")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Scopolamine" = "#4B0082")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4))# + ylim(c(0,400))
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Scopolamine
```

Find the mean T50 point (target_time_N <- mean(all_t50_times[which(all_t50_times$Solution == "N"),]$time_50pct)/60))

Go back to the cumulative dataframe (subset by focal treatment)
```{r}
cumulative_analysis_data_S <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "SCOP" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Sucrose"),]
cumulative_analysis_data_X <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Treatment == "SCOP" & all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]
```

```{r}
final_duration_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop") #Obtain end durations on sucrose for each bee
final_duration_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_duration = max(Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee),
                   Solution = "Scopolamine",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_duration_S <- final_duration_S %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_duration_X <- final_duration_X %>% 
  dplyr::filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_duration_S$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_S$final_duration)
final_duration_X$final_duration <- as.numeric(final_duration_X$final_duration)

final_duration_S$final_duration <- final_duration_S$final_duration*60
final_duration_X$final_duration <- final_duration_X$final_duration*60

final_duration_SCOP_sucrose <- final_duration_S
final_duration_SCOP_scopolamine <- final_duration_X

#Put these final values back into the original cumulative dataframe so can then identify point at which 50% threshold crossed
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_duration_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_duration_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee / final_duration*60) #NB: this is a proportion, not a percentage...
```


Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration <- t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration, t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration)

t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration <- all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$time_50pct_Scopolamine)==1),]$time_50pct_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_duration$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
```

The above produces a wide dataframe with one row per bee, with time to 50% for each solution and cumulative metrics for each solution as different variables

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final feeding", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

Plotting Scopolamine duration
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Scopolamine <- mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Scopolamine <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Scopolamine") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Scopolamine) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Scopolamine))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_duration$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_duration %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_Scopolamine <- cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_Scopolamine +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Scopolamine, xend = target_time_Scopolamine,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Scopolamine$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#4B0082",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Scopolamine,
        y = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_X$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#4B0082",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) + 
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2, yend = mean(final_duration_S$final_duration)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)

cumulative_indiv_duration_plot_segments_Scopolamine
```

Scopolamine attempts

```{r}
final_attempts_S <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Sucrose",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_X <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(final_attempts = max(Cumulative_attempts_bee),
                   Solution = "Scopolamine",
                   .groups = "drop")
final_attempts_S <- final_attempts_S %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")
final_attempts_X <- final_attempts_X %>% 
  filter(bee_ID != "NA_NA")

final_attempts_SCOP_sucrose <- final_attempts_S
final_attempts_SCOP_scopolamine <- final_attempts_X

cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_Scopolamine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_S %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_S, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_Scopolamine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_X %>%
  left_join(final_attempts_X, by = c("bee_ID", "Solution")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percent_final = Cumulative_attempts_bee / final_attempts)
```

Find the timestamp of bouts that crossed the relevant threshold
```{r}
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_S_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts <- t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Solution, .keep_all = TRUE)

t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts <- cumulative_analysis_data_with_percent_X_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(percent_final >= 0.5) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  slice_min(Time_min, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    bee_ID, Solution, time_50pct = Time_min,
    Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee, Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee)

all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts, t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts)

t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts <- all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = c(time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee,
                    Cumulative_attempts_bee, Cumulative_sips_overall_bee),
    names_sep = "_")

t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$time_50pct_Sucrose)==1),]$time_50pct_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Sucrose <- 0

t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_attempts_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$time_50pct_Scopolamine)==1),]$time_50pct_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts[which(is.na(t50_wide_Scopolamine_attempts$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Scopolamine)==1),]$Cumulative_sips_overall_bee_Scopolamine <- 0
```

**t50 time**
```{r}
ggplot(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts, aes(x = Solution, y = time_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_bw() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(y = "Time to 50% of final attempts", x = "Solution")

mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$time_50pct)
mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)
```

```{r}
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)

# Define cumulative time series data
time_series_S_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_attempts_change
# Number of bootstrap samples
num_samples <- 1000

# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_S_attempts, num_samples)

# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))

# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_S_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_S_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)

annotated_data_attempts$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts$Solution <- "Sucrose"


# Define your cumulative time series data (example)
time_series_X_attempts <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$av_attempts_change
# Run the bootstrap function
boot_samples <- bootstrap_time_series(time_series_X_attempts, num_samples)
# Calculate the mean and 95% confidence intervals for each time point
boot_means <- apply(boot_samples, 2, mean)
boot_se <- apply(boot_samples, 2, sd)  # Standard deviation as SE
boot_ci_lower <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
boot_ci_upper <- apply(boot_samples, 2, function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
# Annotate the original data with the error (lower and upper CI)
annotated_data_attempts2 <- data.frame(
  Time = 1:length(time_series_X_attempts),
  Cumulative = time_series_X_attempts,
  Boot_Mean = boot_means,
  SE = boot_se,
  CI_Lower = boot_ci_lower,
  CI_Upper = boot_ci_upper)
annotated_data_attempts2$Actual_cumulative <- binned_data_summary[which(binned_data_summary$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$av_cumulative_attempts
annotated_data_attempts2$Solution <- "Scopolamine"
```


```{r}
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(annotated_data_attempts, annotated_data_attempts2)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min <- (Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time * 60)-60

# Add the new row to the dataframe
Cumulative_data_error_attempts <- rbind(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, S_origin_row, Sc_origin_row)
Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_hrs <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts$Time_min/60

cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Scopolamine <- ggplot(Cumulative_data_error_attempts, aes(x = Time_hrs, y = Actual_cumulative, color = Solution, group = Solution)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) + theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),  # x axis label size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),  # y axis label size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + 
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Actual_cumulative-SE, ymax = Actual_cumulative+SE, fill = Solution), alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  labs(y = "Mean cumulative feeding attempts per bee (s)", x = "Time in experiment (hours)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Scopolamine" = "#4B0082")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Scopolamine" = "#4B0082")) +  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 24, by = 4)) 
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Scopolamine
```

Plotting Scopolamine attempts
```{r}
# Extract y-value on nicotine curve at 4.92 hrs
target_time_Scopolamine <- mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts$Solution == "Scopolamine"),]$time_50pct)/60 #Get the mean observed 50% threshold, in hours rather than mins
target_point_Scopolamine <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Scopolamine") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Scopolamine) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Scopolamine))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties
target_time_Sucrose <- mean(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts[which(all_t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts$Solution == "Sucrose"),]$time_50pct)/60
target_point_Sucrose <- Cumulative_data_error_attempts %>%
  dplyr::filter(Solution == "Sucrose") %>%
  dplyr::filter(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose) == min(abs(Time_hrs - target_time_Sucrose))) %>%
  slice(1)  # In case of ties

# Add dotted line to plot
cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_Scopolamine <- cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_Scopolamine +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Scopolamine, xend = target_time_Scopolamine,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Scopolamine$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#4B0082",
    size = 1)  +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Scopolamine,
        y = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_X$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#4B0082",
    size = 1)  +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = target_time_Sucrose, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = 0, yend = target_point_Sucrose$Actual_cumulative),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1) +  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = target_time_Sucrose,
        y = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2, yend = mean(final_attempts_S$final_attempts)/2),
    linetype = "dotted",
    color = "#5dade2",
    size = 1)


cumulative_indiv_attempts_plot_segments_Scopolamine
```



STATS

```{r}
final_duration_AREC_sucrose$Treatment <- "AREC"
final_duration_AREC_arecoline$Treatment <- "AREC"
final_duration_CAF_sucrose$Treatment <- "CAF"
final_duration_CAF_caffeine$Treatment <- "CAF"
final_duration_TMX_sucrose$Treatment <- "TMX"
final_duration_TMX_tmx$Treatment <- "TMX"
final_duration_SCOP_sucrose$Treatment <- "SCOP"
final_duration_SCOP_scopolamine$Treatment <- "SCOP"

total_durations <- rbind(final_duration_AREC_sucrose, final_duration_AREC_arecoline, final_duration_CAF_sucrose, final_duration_CAF_caffeine, 
                         final_duration_TMX_sucrose, final_duration_TMX_tmx, final_duration_SCOP_sucrose, final_duration_SCOP_scopolamine)

total_durations$Solution_type <- ifelse(total_durations$Solution=="Sucrose", "S", "X")

total_durations$Solution_type <- as.factor(total_durations$Solution_type)
total_durations$Treatment <- as.factor(total_durations$Treatment)
```

Total duration fed
```{r}
library(lmerTest)
total_fed_mod <- lmer(sqrt(final_duration) ~ Solution_type * Treatment + (1|bee_ID), data = total_durations)
summary(total_fed_mod)
simres <- simulateResiduals(total_fed_mod)
plot(simres)
anova(total_fed_mod)

emm_durationtotal <- emmeans(total_fed_mod, ~ Solution_type | Treatment)
emm_durationtotal_pairs <- pairs(emm_durationtotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_durationtotal_pairs
```


```{r}
final_attempts_AREC_sucrose$Treatment <- "AREC"
final_attempts_AREC_arecoline$Treatment <- "AREC"
final_attempts_CAF_sucrose$Treatment <- "CAF"
final_attempts_CAF_caffeine$Treatment <- "CAF"
final_attempts_TMX_sucrose$Treatment <- "TMX"
final_attempts_TMX_tmx$Treatment <- "TMX"
final_attempts_SCOP_sucrose$Treatment <- "SCOP"
final_attempts_SCOP_scopolamine$Treatment <- "SCOP"

total_attempts <- rbind(final_attempts_AREC_sucrose, final_attempts_AREC_arecoline, final_attempts_CAF_sucrose, final_attempts_CAF_caffeine, 
                         final_attempts_TMX_sucrose, final_attempts_TMX_tmx, final_attempts_SCOP_sucrose, final_attempts_SCOP_scopolamine)

total_attempts$Solution_type <- ifelse(total_attempts$Solution=="Sucrose", "S", "X")

total_attempts$Solution_type <- as.factor(total_attempts$Solution_type)
total_attempts$Treatment <- as.factor(total_attempts$Treatment)
```

Total attempts
```{r}
library(lmerTest)
total_attempts_mod <- lmer(sqrt(final_attempts) ~ Solution_type * Treatment + (1|bee_ID), data = total_attempts)
summary(total_attempts_mod)
simres <- simulateResiduals(total_attempts_mod)
plot(simres)
anova(total_attempts_mod)

emm_attemptstotal <- emmeans(total_attempts_mod, ~ Solution_type | Treatment)
emm_attemptstotal_pairs <- pairs(emm_attemptstotal, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_attemptstotal_pairs
```



T50 stats

Going to produce 4 lmers, each testing T50 or total; and duration or attempts
To do this, need to produce a dataframe with a row for each bee showing bee ID, solution, T50 attempts, total attempts, T50 duration, total duration

Get rid of unnecessary variables in each dataframe
Then join by bee_ID and solution

```{r}
#Arecoline attempts
t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts$Treatment <- "AREC"
t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts_ <- t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts$Treatment <- "AREC"
t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_arecoline_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_arecoline_attempts_, t50_times_S_arecoline_attempts_)
#Arecoline duration
t50_times_X_arecoline_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_X_arecoline_duration$Treatment <- "AREC"
t50_times_X_arecoline_duration_ <- t50_times_X_arecoline_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S_arecoline_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_arecoline_duration$Treatment <- "AREC"
t50_times_S_arecoline_duration_ <- t50_times_S_arecoline_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_arecoline_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_arecoline_duration_, t50_times_S_arecoline_duration_)

#Caffeine attempts
t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts$Treatment <- "CAF"
t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts_ <- t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts$Treatment <- "CAF"
t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_Caffeine_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_Caffeine_attempts_, t50_times_S_Caffeine_attempts_)
#Caffeine duration
t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration$Treatment <- "CAF"
t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration_ <- t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration$Treatment <- "CAF"
t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration_ <- t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_Caffeine_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_Caffeine_duration_, t50_times_S_Caffeine_duration_)

#TMX attempts
t50_times_X_TMX_attempts$Treatment <- "TMX"
t50_times_X_TMX_attempts_ <- t50_times_X_TMX_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S_TMX_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_TMX_attempts$Treatment <- "TMX"
t50_times_S_TMX_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_TMX_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_TMX_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_TMX_attempts_, t50_times_S_TMX_attempts_)
#TMX duration
t50_times_X_TMX_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_X_TMX_duration$Treatment <- "TMX"
t50_times_X_TMX_duration_ <- t50_times_X_TMX_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S_TMX_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_TMX_duration$Treatment <- "TMX"
t50_times_S_TMX_duration_ <- t50_times_S_TMX_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_TMX_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_TMX_duration_, t50_times_S_TMX_duration_)

#Scopolamine attempts
t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts$Treatment <- "SCOP"
t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts_ <- t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts$Behaviour <- "Attempts"
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts$Treatment <- "SCOP"
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts_ <- t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_attempts_bee)
t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts <- rbind(t50_times_X_Scopolamine_attempts_, t50_times_S_Scopolamine_attempts_)
#Scopolamine duration
t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration$Treatment <- "SCOP"
t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration_ <- t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration$Behaviour <- "Duration"
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration$Treatment <- "SCOP"
t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration_ <- t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Solution, time_50pct, Cumulative_Duration_overall_bee)
t50_times_Scopolamine_duration <- rbind(t50_times_X_Scopolamine_duration_, t50_times_S_Scopolamine_duration_)
```

```{r}
t50_times_Arecoline <- 
  t50_times_arecoline_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_arecoline_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

t50_times_Caffeine <- 
  t50_times_Caffeine_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_Caffeine_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

t50_times_TMX <- 
  t50_times_TMX_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_TMX_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

t50_times_Scopolamine <- 
  t50_times_Scopolamine_duration %>%
  # Rename variables so they stay distinct after joining
  dplyr::rename(time_50pct_duration = time_50pct) %>%
  left_join(
    t50_times_Scopolamine_attempts %>%
      dplyr::rename(time_50pct_attempts = time_50pct),
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution"))

all_choice_t50_times <- rbind(t50_times_Arecoline, t50_times_Caffeine, t50_times_TMX, t50_times_Scopolamine)
```

Duration E50
```{r}
library(lmerTest)
lmm_duration_E50 <- lmer(time_50pct_duration ~ Solution_type*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_duration_E50)
anova(lmm_duration_E50)

emm_durationE50 <- emmeans(lmm_duration_E50, ~ Solution_type | Treatment)
emm_durationE50_pairs <- pairs(emm_durationE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_durationE50_pairs
```

Attempts E50
```{r}
lmm_attempts_E50 <- lmer(time_50pct_attempts ~ Solution_type*Treatment + (1|bee_ID),
                       data = all_choice_t50_times)
summary(lmm_attempts_E50)
anova(lmm_attempts_E50)

emm_attemptsE50 <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_E50, ~ Solution_type | Treatment)
pairs(emm_attemptsE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
emm_attemptsE50_pairs <- pairs(emm_attemptsE50, adjust = "none", reverse = TRUE)
```

```{r}
pvals <- c(
  #Totals
  0.5470,
  0.3096,
  0.7143,
  0.5539,
  0.3026,
  0.1280,
  0.1951,
  0.2770,
  #T50s
  0.0952,
  0.0991,
  0.3827,
  0.3405,
  0.3491,
  0.9401,
  0.1197,
  0.1082)

p.adjust(pvals, method = "fdr")
```

Feeding visit rate post hoc pairwise comparisons

```{r}
lmm_attempts_E50
emm <- emmeans(lmm_attempts_E50, ~ Solution_type | Treatment)
drug_suc_diff <- contrast(emm, method = "revpairwise", simple = "Solution_type", by = "Treatment")
drug_suc_diff_df <- rbind(drug_suc_diff)
pairs(drug_suc_diff_df, adjust = "none")
pairs(drug_suc_diff_df, adjust = "tukey")
```


**************************************
# 4. Feeding rate analysis
**************************************

We want a dataframe containing bee_ID, treatment, solution, time bin (full), total seconds fed, total feeds
Can then plot mean beh by solution and time
If 0 feeds then put 0 in

```{r}
binned_data_duration_all <- all_drinking_data_cumulative_0[which(all_drinking_data_cumulative_0$Time_hrs <=24),] %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, Treatment, Time_hrs, Solution, seconds_fed, Cumulative_indiv_duration_sec) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Time_bin = cut_width(Time_hrs, width = 4, boundary = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, bee_ID, Treatment, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_duration = sum(seconds_fed),
    number_feedingattempts = n(),
    .groups = "drop")

# Define allowed solutions for each treatment
solution_map <- tibble(
  Treatment = c("AREC", "AREC",
                "CAF", "CAF",
                "TMX", "TMX",
                "SCOP", "SCOP"),
  Solution = c("Arecoline", "Sucrose",
               "Caffeine", "Sucrose",
               "TMX", "Sucrose",
               "Scopolamine", "Sucrose"))

# Get all bee/treatment combinations
bees <- binned_data_duration_all %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Treatment) %>%
  drop_na()

# Get all time bins
time_bins <- binned_data_duration_all %>%
  distinct(Time_bin)

# Build full expected structure
full_structure <- bees %>%
  left_join(solution_map, by = "Treatment") %>%
  crossing(time_bins)

# Join original data and fill missing values
binned_data_all_summarised <- full_structure %>%
  left_join(
    binned_data_duration_all,
    by = c("bee_ID", "Treatment", "Solution", "Time_bin")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_duration = replace_na(total_duration, 0),
    number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

binned_data_all_summarised <- binned_data_all_summarised %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lower = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+(?=,)")),
    upper = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "(?<=,)\\d+")),
    midpoint_hrs = (lower + upper) / 2
  ) %>%
  select(-lower, -upper)
```

## Arecoline

```{r}
# Summarize the mean for each Solution in each time bin, filtering for Nic_choice
mean_data_arecoline_duration <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")
mean_data_arecoline_feeds <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")

mean_data_arecoline_duration$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
mean_data_arecoline_feeds$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
```

### Duration

```{r}
# Create the plot
arecoline_duration_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = total_duration, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_arecoline_duration, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_arecoline_duration, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0â€“4", "4â€“8", "8â€“12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 300))

arecoline_duration_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_arecoline_duration <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_arecoline_duration)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_arecoline_duration)

mod_arecoline_duration_red <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),])
car::Anova(mod_arecoline_duration_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_arecoline_duration, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

### Feeds

```{r}
# Create the plot
arecoline_feeds_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = number_feedingattempts, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_arecoline_feeds, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_arecoline_feeds, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Arecoline" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0â€“4", "4â€“8", "8â€“12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) 

arecoline_feeds_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_arecoline_feeds <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_arecoline_feeds)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_arecoline_feeds)

mod_arecoline_feeds_red <- glmmTMB(number_feedingattempts~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "AREC"),])
car::Anova(mod_arecoline_feeds_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_arecoline_feeds, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```



## Caffeine

```{r}
# Summarize the mean for each Solution in each time bin, filtering for Nic_choice
mean_data_caffeine_duration <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "CAF"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(total_duration, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")
mean_data_caffeine_feeds <- binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "CAF"),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_fed = mean(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE),
                   se = sd(number_feedingattempts, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
                   lower = mean_fed - se,
                   upper = mean_fed + se,
                   .groups = "drop")

mean_data_caffeine_duration$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
mean_data_caffeine_feeds$midpoint_hrs <- c(2, 2, 6, 6, 10, 10, 14, 14, 18, 18, 22, 22)
```

### Duration

```{r}
# Create the plot
caffeine_duration_binned_plot <- ggplot(binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "CAF"),],
                                      aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = total_duration, color = Solution, shape = Solution)) +
  # Scatter plot with jitter for individual points
  geom_point(aes(color = Solution, shape = Solution), alpha = 0.5,  position = position_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0)) + 
  geom_ribbon(data = mean_data_caffeine_duration, inherit.aes = FALSE,
              aes(x = midpoint_hrs, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Solution),
              alpha = 0.4) +
  # Line connecting the mean values across time bins
  geom_line(data = mean_data_caffeine_duration, aes(x = midpoint_hrs, y = mean_fed, color = Solution), size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sucrose" = "#5dade2", "Caffeine" = "#FFAC1C")) +
  labs(x = "Time segment (h)",
       y = "Total feeding duration (s)",
       title = "") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22), labels = c("0â€“4", "4â€“8", "8â€“12", "12-16", "16-20", "20-24")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", 
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold",)) + ylim(c(0, 300))

caffeine_duration_binned_plot
```

```{r}
mod_caffeine_duration <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution * as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "CAF"),])

simres <- simulateResiduals(mod_caffeine_duration)
plot(simres)
testDispersion(simres)
testZeroInflation(simres) 
car::Anova(mod_caffeine_duration)

mod_caffeine_duration_red <- glmmTMB(total_duration~Solution + as.factor(Time_bin) + (1|bee_ID), 
                             family = tweedie(), 
                             data = binned_data_all_summarised[which(binned_data_all_summarised$Treatment == "CAF"),])
car::Anova(mod_caffeine_duration_red)

emmb <- emmeans(mod_caffeine_duration, ~ Solution|Time_bin)
contrast(emmb, method = "pairwise", adjust = "bonferroni")
```

### Feeds

```{r}
# Create the plot
```
