```{r}
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = Arecoline + Sucrose)

indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline <- filled_data_4h_arecoline %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_Arecoline = cumsum(Arecoline),
    cumulative_Sucrose = cumsum(Sucrose),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_Arecoline - cumulative_Sucrose,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_Arecoline - cumulative_Sucrose) / (cumulative_Arecoline + cumulative_Sucrose))

indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline <- indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline %>%
  left_join(final_totals_arecoline, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_Arecoline - cumulative_Sucrose) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline <- indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_arecoline <- indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_Arecoline = 0, cumulative_Sucrose = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_arecoline <- bind_rows(start_points_arecoline, indiv_pref_trajectories_arecoline) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_arecoline <- plot_data_arecoline[which(plot_data_arecoline$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_arecoline <- plot_data_arecoline[which(plot_data_arecoline$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_arecoline <- end_values_arecoline %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
arecoline_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_arecoline[which(plot_data_arecoline$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_arecoline,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60 ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "red",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D caffeine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_arecoline, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#bf3737", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

arecoline_indiv_plot
```


## Caffeine

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid_caffeine <- binned_data_duration_caffeine %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_caffeine <- binned_data_duration_caffeine %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_caffeine$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_caffeine$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_caffeine <- full_data_caffeine %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_caffeine, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions

```{r}
binned_data_summary_caffeine <- filled_data_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_caffeine <- binned_data_summary_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("Caffeine", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_caffeine <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_caffeine, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_caffeine <- binned_data_summary_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_caffeine <- filled_data_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))

filled_data_4h_caffeine <- filled_data_caffeine %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_caffeine <- filled_data_4h_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_caffeine <- filled_data_4h_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = Caffeine + Sucrose)

indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine <- filled_data_4h_caffeine %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_Caffeine = cumsum(Caffeine),
    cumulative_Sucrose = cumsum(Sucrose),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_Caffeine - cumulative_Sucrose,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_Caffeine - cumulative_Sucrose) / (cumulative_Caffeine + cumulative_Sucrose))

indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine %>%
  left_join(final_totals_caffeine, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_Caffeine - cumulative_Sucrose) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_caffeine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_Caffeine = 0, cumulative_Sucrose = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_caffeine <- bind_rows(start_points_caffeine, indiv_pref_trajectories_caffeine) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_caffeine <- plot_data_caffeine[which(plot_data_caffeine$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_caffeine <- plot_data_caffeine[which(plot_data_caffeine$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_caffeine <- end_values_caffeine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
caffeine_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_caffeine[which(plot_data_caffeine$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_caffeine,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60 ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#FFAC1C",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D caffeine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_caffeine, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#FFAC1C", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

caffeine_indiv_plot
```


## TMX

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid_TMX <- binned_data_duration_tmx %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_TMX <- binned_data_duration_tmx %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_tmx$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_tmx$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_TMX <- full_data_TMX %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_tmx, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions

```{r}
binned_data_summary_TMX <- filled_data_TMX %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_TMX <- binned_data_summary_TMX %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("TMX", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_TMX <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_TMX, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_TMX <- binned_data_summary_TMX %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_TMX <- filled_data_TMX %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))

filled_data_4h_TMX <- filled_data_TMX %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_TMX <- filled_data_4h_TMX %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_TMX <- filled_data_4h_TMX %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = TMX + Sucrose)

indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX <- filled_data_4h_TMX %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_TMX = cumsum(TMX),
    cumulative_Sucrose = cumsum(Sucrose),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_TMX - cumulative_Sucrose,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_TMX - cumulative_Sucrose) / (cumulative_TMX + cumulative_Sucrose))

indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX <- indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX %>%
  left_join(final_totals_TMX, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_TMX - cumulative_Sucrose) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX <- indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_TMX <- indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_TMX = 0, cumulative_Sucrose = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_TMX <- bind_rows(start_points_TMX, indiv_pref_trajectories_TMX) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_TMX <- plot_data_TMX[which(plot_data_TMX$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_TMX <- plot_data_TMX[which(plot_data_TMX$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_TMX <- end_values_TMX %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
TMX_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_TMX[which(plot_data_TMX$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_TMX,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60 ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "darkgreen",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D TMX; 643B9F TMX
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_TMX, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "darkgreen", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

TMX_indiv_plot
```


## Scopolamine

Fill in missing cumulative entries (if no bouts occurred for a given bee in a given time bin, add a row to the dataframe with 0s for the behaviours)
```{r}
# Create a reference grid of all combinations
bee_time_solution_grid_scopolamine <- binned_data_duration_scopolamine %>%
  distinct(bee_ID, Time_bin, Solution)

# Expand to all combinations of bee_ID x Time_bin x Solution
full_data_scopolamine <- binned_data_duration_scopolamine %>%
  distinct(bee_ID) %>%
  crossing(
    Time_bin = unique(binned_data_duration_scopolamine$Time_bin),
    Solution = unique(binned_data_duration_scopolamine$Solution))

# Join original data into full grid
filled_data_scopolamine <- full_data_scopolamine %>%
  left_join(binned_data_duration_scopolamine, by = c("bee_ID", "Time_bin", "Solution")) %>%
  # Order for fill to work properly
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin) %>%
  # Fill missing cumulative durations forward within each bee + solution
  group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_total_duration, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(max_sips, .direction = "down") %>%
  tidyr::fill(number_feedingattempts, .direction = "down") %>%
  # If it starts with missing (i.e., first bin), set to 0
  dplyr::mutate(max_total_duration = replace_na(max_total_duration, 0),
         max_sips = replace_na(max_sips, 0),
         number_feedingattempts = replace_na(number_feedingattempts, 0)) %>%
   # Step 1: lag previous total duration
  dplyr::mutate(prev_duration = lag(max_total_duration, default = 0),
                # Step 2: check if it increased
                new_attempt = if_else(max_total_duration > prev_duration, 1, 0),
                # Step 3: cumulative count only when duration increases
                cumulative_feedingattempts = cumsum(if_else(new_attempt == 1, number_feedingattempts, 0))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bee_ID) & bee_ID != "NA_NA") %>%
  ungroup()
```

Average cumulative duration, sips, and attempts within time bins and solutions

```{r}
binned_data_summary_scopolamine <- filled_data_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Time_bin_str = as.character(Time_bin),
    Time_bin_upper = as.numeric(sub(".*,(.*)\\)|.*,(.*)\\]", "\\1\\2", Time_bin_str))) 

binned_data_summary_scopolamine <- binned_data_summary_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Time_bin_upper, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(av_cumulative_duration = mean(max_total_duration),
                   av_cumulative_sips = mean(max_sips),
                   av_sip_frequency = mean(av_sipfreq, na.rm = TRUE),
                   av_cumulative_attempts = mean(cumulative_feedingattempts),
                   av_ISI = mean(av_inter_sip_interval),
                   .groups = "drop")
  
new_row <- data.frame(
  Time_bin_upper = 0,
  Solution = c("Scopolamine", "Sucrose"),  # Add both solutions for Time_bin = 0
  av_cumulative_duration = 0,
  av_cumulative_sips = 0,
  av_cumulative_attempts = 0,
  av_sip_frequency = 0,
  av_ISI = 0)

binned_data_summary_scopolamine <- bind_rows(binned_data_summary_scopolamine, new_row) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper)

binned_data_summary_scopolamine <- binned_data_summary_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Solution, Time_bin_upper) %>%  # Ensure the data is ordered by Solution and Time_bin_upper
  dplyr::group_by(Solution) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    av_duration_change = av_cumulative_duration - lag(av_cumulative_duration), #Do this for rate analysis 
    av_sips_change = av_cumulative_sips - lag(av_cumulative_sips),
    av_attempts_change = av_cumulative_attempts - lag(av_cumulative_attempts)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(av_duration_change = replace_na(av_duration_change, 0),
                av_sips_change = replace_na(av_sips_change, 0),
                av_attempts_change = replace_na(av_attempts_change, 0)) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
filled_data_scopolamine <- filled_data_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_seconds_fed = dplyr::if_else(
      Time_bin == "[0,1]",
      max_total_duration,
      max_total_duration - prev_duration))

filled_data_4h_scopolamine <- filled_data_scopolamine %>%
  # Extract lower bound of each bin
  dplyr::mutate(hour_start = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin, "\\d+"))) %>%
  # Create 4 h bins
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_4h_start = floor(hour_start / 4) * 4,
      Time_bin_minutes = paste0(
      bin_4h_start * 60,
      "-",
      (bin_4h_start + 4) * 60)) %>%
  # Sum feeding time within 4 h bins
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution, Time_bin_minutes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_seconds_fed = sum(total_seconds_fed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

filled_data_4h_scopolamine <- filled_data_4h_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    bin_start_min = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "^\\d+"))) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, Solution, bin_start_min)
```

```{r}
final_totals_scopolamine <- filled_data_4h_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID, Solution) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(total_seconds_fed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total_experiment = Scopolamine + Sucrose)

indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine <- filled_data_4h_scopolamine %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Solution,
    values_from = total_seconds_fed,
    values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, bin_start_min) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    cumulative_Scopolamine = cumsum(Scopolamine),
    cumulative_Sucrose = cumsum(Sucrose),
    PI_cumul_1 = cumulative_Scopolamine - cumulative_Sucrose,
    PI_cumul_3 = (cumulative_Scopolamine - cumulative_Sucrose) / (cumulative_Scopolamine + cumulative_Sucrose))

indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine %>%
  left_join(final_totals_scopolamine, by = "bee_ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PI_cumul_2 = (cumulative_Scopolamine - cumulative_Sucrose) / total_experiment) %>%
  ungroup()

bin_width <- 240
# Extract time_bin midpoint for plotting
indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = as.numeric(str_extract(Time_bin_minutes, "\\d+$")) - (bin_width/2))

# Add a starting point at (0, 0) for each bee
start_points_scopolamine <- indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(midpoint = 0, cumulative_Scopolamine = 0, cumulative_Sucrose = 0, PI_cumul_1 = 0, PI_cumul_2 = 0, PI_cumul_3 = 0)

# Combine starting points with cumulative data
plot_data_scopolamine <- bind_rows(start_points_scopolamine, indiv_pref_trajectories_scopolamine) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(bee_ID, midpoint)
```

```{r}
average_data_scopolamine <- plot_data_scopolamine[which(plot_data_scopolamine$total_experiment>=10),] %>%#plot_data_quinine[which(plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 9 & plot_data_quinine$bee_ID != 31),] %>%
  dplyr::group_by(midpoint) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(mean_PI_cumul_1 = mean(PI_cumul_1, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_2 = mean(PI_cumul_2, na.rm = TRUE),
                   mean_PI_cumul_3 = mean(PI_cumul_3, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Continuous colour at start and smooth colouration of big jumps
```{r}
end_values_scopolamine <- plot_data_scopolamine[which(plot_data_scopolamine$total_experiment>=10),] %>%
  dplyr::filter(midpoint == 120) %>%
  dplyr::select(bee_ID, PI_cumul_2) %>%
  filter(is.finite(PI_cumul_2))

n_steps <- 100

manual_segments_scopolamine <- end_values_scopolamine %>%
  dplyr::group_by(bee_ID) %>%
  reframe(
    midpoint = seq(0, 120, length.out = n_steps),
    PI_cumul_2 = seq(0, PI_cumul_2, length.out = n_steps))
```

```{r}
scopolamine_indiv_plot <- ggplot(plot_data_scopolamine[which(plot_data_scopolamine$total_experiment>=10),], aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8, alpha = 1, aes(color = PI_cumul_2)) +
geom_line(
  data = manual_segments_scopolamine,
  aes(x = midpoint, y = PI_cumul_2, group = bee_ID, color = PI_cumul_2, alpha = 1),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1440, by = 240),
    labels = function(x) x / 60 ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") + # Horizontal line at y=0
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray80", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none",  # Remove legend for individual lines
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),  # Transparent panel background
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),    # Transparent plot background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 0, face = "bold")) + scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#5dade2",   # Red
    mid = "snow2",     # Neutral
    high = "#643B9F",  # Green 00A86B; #FDDA0D scopolamine; 643B9F scopolamine
    midpoint = 0,      # Set the midpoint to 0
    limits = c(-1, 1), # Adjust the limits based on the range of cumulative_net
    name = "PI")  + ylim(c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative net consumption of focal solution over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cumulative net consumption (N - S)",
  ) + geom_smooth(data = average_data_scopolamine, aes(x = midpoint, y = mean_PI_cumul_2), inherit.aes = FALSE, method = "loess", lty = "dashed", color = "#643B9F", fill = "gray70", alpha = 0.4, se = FALSE)

scopolamine_indiv_plot
```
